choose.when: select null as user_id, ent_code, parent_code, ent_name, social_credit_code from t_bas_enterprise
choose.otherwise: select ${loginUserId} as user_id, ue.ent_code, e.parent_code, e.ent_name, e.social_credit_code from sys_user u left join sys_user_ent ue on ue.user_id = u.user_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = ue.ent_code where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{loginUserId}

select.if: union all select ${queryUserId} as user_id, ue.ent_code, e.parent_code, e.ent_name, e.social_credit_code from sys_user u left join sys_user_ent ue on ue.user_id = u.user_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = ue.ent_code where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{queryUserId}
